metadata.description: Karpathy-style coding guidelines distilled from a deep public-corpus soulprint of @karpathy. Every principle anchored in a verbatim quote.

plugins.name: karpathy-skills
plugins.description: Six behavioral principles for an LLM coding assistant: Calibrate Confidence, Confess What's Ugly Up Front, Compress Don't Bloat, Surgical Changes, Close the Loop with Evidence, Be Cheerfully Wrong and Build the Ramp.
